idea-plugin.name: Pi Agent Launcher
idea-plugin.description:
Pi Agent Launcher

One-click Pi coding agent launcher for JetBrains IDEs — keeps the Pi coding agent CLI one click away inside the IDE.

Important: Install the Pi CLI separately before using this plugin.
npm i -g @anthropic-ai/pi-coding-agent or visit pi.dev

✨ Features

  • One-click launch from the toolbar
  • Integrated terminal that opens a dedicated "Pi" tab in the project root
  • Send to Pi — select code, right-click, and send file reference (@path/file.go#L10-25) to Pi's input
  • Auto-open files modified by Pi in the editor
  • Completion notifications after Pi finishes processing
  • Flexible configuration for models, thinking levels, and launch options

🚀 Usage

Quick Start

  1. Click the π button in the main toolbar.
  2. The integrated terminal opens a new "Pi" tab and runs pi automatically.
  3. Select code → Right-click → Send to Pi to add file context to your prompt.

Configuration

Open Settings → Tools → Pi Agent to pick the model, thinking level, notification behavior, and auto-open options.

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Cmd+Esc (Mac) / Ctrl+Esc (Win/Linux) — Toggle Pi panel
  • Cmd+Shift+P (Mac) / Ctrl+Shift+P (Win/Linux) — Send selection to Pi

Supported IDEs

Works with all JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ IDEA, GoLand, PyCharm, WebStorm, PhpStorm, CLion, Rider, RubyMine, and more.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • One-click launch from toolbar (π icon)
  • Integrated terminal with Pi CLI
  • Send selection as file reference (@path#Lstart-end)
  • Auto-open files modified by Pi
  • Completion notifications
  • Settings panel: model selection, thinking level, custom args
  • Models loaded from ~/.pi/agent/models.json

action.description: Launch Pi agent in integrated terminal
Open or focus Pi agent terminal
Send selected code reference to Pi
